questions.q: Which "lost" Octavia E. Butler novel, which the author had previously blocked from reprinting, was announced in late April 2026 to be returning to shelves in a new edition after more than 40 years?
Universal Pictures recently shifted its release calendar, bumping 'Miami Vice '85' to 2028 and moving which horror-adventure sequel up to October 2027?
What upcoming western-thriller directed by Park Chan-wook recently announced a cast including Matthew McConaughey, Austin Butler, and Pedro Pascal?
Which golfer shot a 65 to open up a commanding 7-shot lead at the 2026 Chevron Championship?
In the announcement trailer for the indie action game Guns 'n Goblins, released on April 25, 2026, what object is shot by the player to 'Call the horde'?
In April 2026, the Writers Guild of America (WGA) ratified a new four-year contract that included significant cuts to what specific member benefit?
Announced in late April 2026, which of the following novels by Robert Jackson Bennett earned a spot as a finalist for the 2026 Hugo Award for Best Novel?
A man in Singapore was recently arrested for allegedly accessing a content server and leaking which unreleased film online?
options: A Lord of the Rings film

questions.q: Releasing in late April 2026, 'Anxietyland' is a graphic memoir chronicling the lifelong experience with anxiety and depression of which popular cartoonist?
What nationwide DEA initiative took place on Saturday, April 25, 2026, to provide a safe means of disposing of unwanted or expired prescription medications?
options: National Prescription Drug Take Back Day
questions.correctText: National Prescription Drug Take Back Day
